source_pr.title: expression: make TestNowAndUTCTimestamp more stable
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/14911

Problem Summary:

It's unbelievable that we call `time.Now()` twice and more than 1s elapse.
But the failed CI shows that's what happens.

### What is changed and how it works?


What's Changed:

I have already enlarged it to 1s from 5ms in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/15058
And 1s is still not enough, so this time I enlarge it to 3s.
If we still meet this problem in the future, I think it's better to remove the test case.

How it Works:



### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
